item.title: zensation-ai/zenbrain
item.description: Neuroscience-inspired memory system for AI agents. 7 layers. FSRS. Hebbian learning. Emotional tagging.

item.title: mi2e-K/RABET
item.description: Cross-platform desktop app for real-time animal behavior video annotation, analysis, and reliability assessment.

item.title: watchouttt/AI-Visualizer-Neural-Network-Architecture
item.description: 🧠 Visualize neural network architectures interactively to enhance your understanding of deep learning, from basic perceptrons to advanced transformers.

item.title: takiama21/imagemage
item.description: 🖼️ Generate and edit images with Google's Gemini API using this lightweight CLI tool, free from unnecessary dependencies and clutter.

item.title: git-yasaswi/Adversarial-Attacks-Vision-Transformers-ViT
item.description: 🛡️ Explore adversarial attacks on Vision Transformers (ViT) and ResNet models, focusing on image classification robustness and defensive strategies.

item.title: mendeltem/mrt-atlas-trainer
item.description: This is a game for neuroscience students to learn brain anatomy.

item.title: hal9222/VAL3000
item.description: 🔧 Control stepper motors wirelessly with VAL3000, the quick and easy driver that requires no programming. Perfect for precise motor management.

item.title: ianochieng25/PanNuke-cell-core-region-identification-with-DINO
item.description: 🧬 Implement nuclei segmentation and classification using DINO self-supervision for histopathology images in a streamlined deep learning pipeline.

item.description: Web interface and docker deployment for python HED (Hierarchical Event Descriptor) tools.

item.description: 🧭 Cultivate awareness and restore presence with Polaris Focus™, an attentional tool that redefines your relationship with time and enhances mental clarity.

item.title: rageelixer853/torchcomms
item.description: 📡 Streamline PyTorch communications with torchcomms, an experimental API offering high-level collectives and ready-to-use backend solutions.

item.description: SpikingJelly is an open-source deep learning framework for Spiking Neural Network (SNN) based on PyTorch.

item.description: Simulation of spiking neural networks (SNNs) using PyTorch.

item.description: Deep learning with spiking neural networks (SNNs) in PyTorch.

item.description: Trio - an automated insulin delivery system for iOS based on the OpenAPS algorithm with adaptations.
